title: Green (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Kashyyyk_trees.jpg|thumb|right|210px|[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], a mostly green and tropical [[Planet/Legends|planet]]]]
{{Quote|Green is the color of grass, and of leaves on the trees, and of Greedo.|Central Computer|<ref name="Colors">''[[Star Wars Adventures in Colors and Shapes]]''</ref>}}
'''Green''' can refer to the following:

The [[Color/Legends|color]] '''green'''.

==Food==
*[[Green Bean]]
*[[Green champagne]]
*[[Green Galaxy]]
*[[Green milk]]
*Green wine, also known as [[Emerald wine]]

==Individuals==
*[[Green]], a [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]
*[[Green (Gungan)|Green]], a member of the [[Gungan Sling Brigade]].
*[[Green Hair]], a leader of the [[Raptors (gang)|Raptor gang]]
*[[Green (clone)|Green]] the [[clone trooper sergeant]]
*[[Dr. Green]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]]
*"[[Green (swooper)|Green]]," a [[Swooper/Legends|Swooper]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]
*"[[Green Leader (clone trooper)/Legends|Green Leader]]," a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who commanded [[Green Company/Legends|Green Company]]
*[[Ol' Green Senator]], a [[fathier]] who competed in the [[Canto Cup]]

==Locations==
*[[Greenbelt]]
*[[Coruscant Green Park]]
*[[Green Coruscant]]
*[[Green Glowstone Tavern]]
*[[Tel Minor system/Legends|Green Nebula]]

*[[Unity Green]]

==Real-world==
*[[Lars Green]], an actor who played an [[Ewok]]
*[[Endor/Legends#Origins|Green Moon]], an early name for [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]
*[[Seth Green]], an American actor, who voiced [[Todo 360/Legends|Todo 360]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' episode "[[Holocron Heist]]" and [[Ion Papanoida/Legends|Ion Papanoida]] in "[[Sphere of Influence]]"
